sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>false</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>false</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,tablet,mobile</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>danger</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>2</order><placeholder_dimensions>{	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) { return {	"mobile": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"desktop": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	},	"tablet": {		"height": "250px",		"width": "100%"	}}; }]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><!-- 
	AngularJS template with configurable options.
	Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior.
	Example: Display an element when max row count is 10:
	<div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div>
	The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders.
-->
	<div class="skeleton-container">
	<!-- Header Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div>
	<!-- Body Skeleton -->
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div>
	<div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">73919ebc658003107f446128b2c67ef1</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="SC Catalog Item">3c29786e87133200e0ef0cf888cb0bdf</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>kanishkar.m</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-02 08:24:48</sys_created_on><sys_id>bdfa92f465c003107f446128b2c67e6d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name/><sys_package display_value="Student Assignment Tracker" source="x_cdltd_student_0">04a737e270b332107f44345fb425468a</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Student Assignment Tracker">04a737e270b332107f44345fb425468a</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_bdfa92f465c003107f446128b2c67e6d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>kanishkar.m</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-02 08:25:09</sys_updated_on><title/><url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
	"show_add_cart_button": {
		"value": "",
		"displayValue": ""
	},
	"show_field_validation_messages": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"show_add_to_wishlist_button": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	},
	"display_cart_on_right": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"show_less_description": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"hide_save_as_draft_button": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	},
	"hide_delivery_time": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	},
	"is_preview": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	},
	"show_drag_and_drop_field": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"disable_url_prefill": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	}
}]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=bdfa92f465c003107f446128b2c67e6d"/></record_update>
